description: Domain-specific routing rules. Activated via stack-config.json domain_mode field per project.

financial-code.description: Code that handles money, AR, AP, revenue, cost. Higher review bar.
financial-code.rationale: Financial bugs are user-visible and compounding. Apr 2026: 32%/38% AR/AP understatements missed by shape-only validation. Cross-check is mandatory.

schema-migration.description: Database schema changes. One-way doors require maximum care.
schema-migration.rationale: Migrations cascade across repos. Coordination + rollback are mandatory.

deploy.description: Code being deployed to production (edge functions, services).
deploy.rationale: Apr 2026: shipped v51 when v52 was on a worktree branch. Branch + version verification mandatory.

ui-design.rationale: Apr 2026: 12 ui_design_matching sessions, 21-commit screenshot loops. Inventory before build, diff before merge.

data-operation.description: Bulk data operations — enrichment, backfill, migration of data values.
data-operation.rationale: Apr 2026: re-enrichment script dropped coverage 90%→34%. Coverage gate mandatory.
